elements.text: As you're sitting with your son in your living room, you notice a small child playing in the corner. You try to ask the child a question, but your son stops you and asks who you're talking to. When your son realizes you're hallucinating, he looks...

elements.name: hallucinating_child--early_mid-stage_symptoms--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
